name: Tysis
description: The Tysis pistol spits out caustic darts that corrode their victims from within.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Tysis pistol spits out caustic darts that corrode their victims from within.

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Neurodes
components.description:
Biotech sensor organ harvested from Infested entities.

Location: Earth, Lua, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25
patchlogs.changes: Tysis Corrosive Damage-over-time will now be apply a single tick to targets the projectile punches through.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed weapons with an embedding projectile (e.g. Tysis) not showing the proper damage amounts in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Prime Vault Hotfix 23.1.2!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a visual bug with the Tysis' dangles getting tangled.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.changes: Polished Tysis’ firing and reload animations.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.5.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Tysis playing doubling reload sounds.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.11
patchlogs.fixes: Damage multipliers for the Amprex, Brakk, Drakgoon, Karak, Hind, Marelok, Mutalist Quanta, Tysis, AkLato, Burston Prime, Lato, Braton, Tetra, Tigris all normalized (no more arbitrary multipliers).
